title: Page Builder

fields.label: Content Sections
fields.name: cms
fields.instructions: Build your page by adding and arranging content sections below. Each section is a modular layout component that you can customize independently. Drag sections to reorder them, and use the collapse/expand controls to manage your workspace efficiently. Note: When using the Page Builder, the standard WordPress content editor is hidden and the 'Show Page Title' setting in the sidebar is ignored.

sub_fields.label: Hero Title
sub_fields.name: hero_title
sub_fields.instructions: Enter the main heading for the hero section. Use line breaks if needed.

sub_fields.label: Hero Kicker
sub_fields.name: hero_kicker
sub_fields.instructions: Enter the supporting line below the title.

sub_fields.label: Hero Summary
sub_fields.name: hero_summary
sub_fields.instructions: Enter the summary text for the hero section.
sub_fields.placeholder: A/Prof Simon Tsao is currently positioned at leading Melbourne hospitals, specialising in Breast and Endocrine Surgery.

sub_fields.label: Background Image
sub_fields.name: hero_background_image
sub_fields.instructions: Upload the hero background image.

sub_fields.label: Hero Title
sub_fields.name: hero_title
sub_fields.instructions: Enter the main heading for the inner hero section. Use line breaks if needed.

sub_fields.label: Show Title Surface
sub_fields.name: show_title_surface
sub_fields.instructions: Enable the translucent white title background used on pages like Breast Conditions and Research.

sub_fields.label: Title Color
sub_fields.name: title_color
sub_fields.instructions: Choose the title color used in the hero heading.

sub_fields.label: Hero Summary
sub_fields.name: hero_summary
sub_fields.instructions: Optional supporting summary. Leave empty for the simple title-only hero style.
sub_fields.placeholder: Embarking on a medical journey can be both daunting and hopeful.

sub_fields.name: background_image

sub_fields.name: form_embed_code
sub_fields.instructions: Paste a plugin shortcode or third-party CRM embed code. This field is intended for raw form output such as shortcodes, iframe embeds, or vendor embed snippets.

sub_fields.label: Main Heading
sub_fields.name: main_heading
sub_fields.instructions: Optional main heading shown above the section content.

sub_fields.label: Section Heading
sub_fields.name: first_heading
sub_fields.instructions: Enter the section heading.

sub_fields.label: Callout Type
sub_fields.name: callout_type
sub_fields.instructions: Choose which type of introductory callout this section should use. Simple Intro Text is the standard option for most sections. Rich Callout With Links is only for bordered callouts that need links, emphasis, or multiple paragraphs.

sub_fields.label: Simple Intro Text
sub_fields.name: first_highlight_text
sub_fields.instructions: Enter a short plain-text introductory line shown below the heading. Use this for standard sections without links or multi-paragraph callouts.
sub_fields.placeholder: A/Prof Tsao has authored or co-authored a range of high impact journal publications in the fields of cancer research, liquid biopsy, extracellular vesicle detection and surgical outcomes.

sub_fields.label: Linked / Rich Callout
sub_fields.name: rich_callout_content
sub_fields.instructions: Enter the full bordered callout content shown below the heading. Use this only when the callout needs links, emphasis, or multiple paragraphs in the same bordered block.

sub_fields.label: Simple Intro Style
sub_fields.name: first_intro_text_style
sub_fields.instructions: Choose how the Simple Intro Text is displayed. Highlighted Text uses the pink left-border callout style. Intro Text uses H5 styling for a softer introductory line.

sub_fields.label: Body Content
sub_fields.name: first_content
sub_fields.instructions: Add the main body content for this section.

sub_fields.label: Secondary Content
sub_fields.name: second_content
sub_fields.instructions: Optional secondary content shown below the main body content. Use this for extra paragraphs, supporting lists, or extended reference content.

sub_fields.label: Bottom Note
sub_fields.name: bottom_note
sub_fields.instructions: Optional supporting note shown below the secondary content. Use this for a reference line such as ORCiD, Scopus, or related source links.

sub_fields.label: CTA Content
sub_fields.name: cta_content
sub_fields.instructions: Optional final centered call to action shown at the bottom of the section.

sub_fields.label: Show Divider Above
sub_fields.name: show_divider_above
sub_fields.instructions: Enable to show the standalone divider block above this section.

sub_fields.label: Section Heading
sub_fields.name: section_heading
sub_fields.instructions: Enter the section heading.

sub_fields.label: Intro Text
sub_fields.name: intro_text
sub_fields.instructions: Optional introductory line shown below the heading. Use this for the short publication overview sentence.

sub_fields.label: Publications Content
sub_fields.name: publications_content
sub_fields.instructions:
Add the publication entries shown in the indented content block. Use the Text tab when adding inline spans. Pink author name: <span class="author">Name</span>

Bold publication title: <span class="title">Title text</span>

sub_fields.label: Reference Note
sub_fields.name: reference_note
sub_fields.instructions: Optional centered note shown below the publication list. Use this for ORCiD, Scopus, or other reference links.

sub_fields.label: CTA Content
sub_fields.name: cta_content
sub_fields.instructions: Optional final centered call to action shown below the reference note.

sub_fields.label: Show Divider Above
sub_fields.name: show_divider_above
sub_fields.instructions: Enable to show the standalone divider block above this section.

sub_fields.label: Section Heading
sub_fields.name: section_heading
sub_fields.instructions: Enter the section heading.

sub_fields.label: Intro Text
sub_fields.name: intro_text
sub_fields.instructions: Optional intro line shown below the heading and above the list. Use this for sections like Day of Your Appointment.

sub_fields.label: List Style Variant
sub_fields.name: list_style_variant
sub_fields.instructions: Choose the bullet style. Default uses one full bullet text field. Highlighted Lead Text uses a pink lead phrase followed by regular supporting text. In both styles you can add accent words with inline HTML such as <span class="text-accent">accent text</span>.

sub_fields.label: List Items
sub_fields.name: list_items
sub_fields.instructions: Optional. Add one bullet per row. The visible fields in each row change based on the selected List Style Variant.

sub_fields.label: Bullet Text
sub_fields.name: default_text
sub_fields.instructions: Use this for the Default list style. Enter the full bullet text in one field. You can add accent words like this: <span class="text-accent">Call (03) 9133 6639</span>.

sub_fields.label: Lead Text
sub_fields.name: lead_text
sub_fields.instructions: Use this for the Highlighted Lead Text style. This becomes the pink phrase at the start of the bullet. You can also add inline accent markup if needed.

sub_fields.label: Supporting Text
sub_fields.name: supporting_text
sub_fields.instructions: Use this for the Highlighted Lead Text style. Enter the regular sentence that follows the pink lead phrase. You can add accent words like this: <span class="text-accent">support person</span>.

sub_fields.label: Body Content
sub_fields.name: body_content
sub_fields.instructions: Optional body content shown after the list. Use this for closing paragraphs or sections without a list.

sub_fields.label: Bottom Content
sub_fields.name: bottom_content
sub_fields.instructions: Optional centered paragraph shown below the main step content. Use this for follow-up notes like the additional appointment sentence on Second Appointment.

sub_fields.label: Bottom CTA Content
sub_fields.name: bottom_cta_content
sub_fields.instructions: Optional centered call to action shown below Bottom Content. You can add accent links such as <span class="text-accent">Cancer Journey page</span> or use a normal link with the link-accent class.

sub_fields.label: Heading Bottom Padding
sub_fields.name: add_heading_bottom_padding
sub_fields.instructions: Enable when the heading needs the extra bottom padding used by sections like Day of Your Appointment.

sub_fields.label: Section Image
sub_fields.name: section_image
sub_fields.instructions: Upload the image for this step section.

sub_fields.label: Show Divider Above
sub_fields.name: show_divider_above
sub_fields.instructions: Enable to show the standalone divider block above this section.

sub_fields.label: Main Heading
sub_fields.name: main_heading
sub_fields.instructions: Enter the main heading for this centered intro section.
sub_fields.placeholder: Top Surgery or Gender Masculinisation Surgery

sub_fields.label: Intro Text
sub_fields.name: intro_text
sub_fields.instructions: Enter the centered introductory text shown below the heading. Use this for short intro copy with optional inline links. To match the original red accent text, switch to the Text editor and wrap the words like this: <span class="text-accent">Your text</span>. Example: <span class="text-accent">gender-affirming</span>.

sub_fields.name: list_items

sub_fields.label: Lead Text
sub_fields.name: lead_text
sub_fields.instructions: Enter the pink lead phrase.

sub_fields.label: Supporting Text
sub_fields.name: supporting_text
sub_fields.instructions: Enter the supporting sentence shown after the lead text.
sub_fields.placeholder: Involves the simple mobilization of surrounding breast tissue to close the defect.

sub_fields.label: Bottom Highlight Note
sub_fields.name: bottom_highlight_note
sub_fields.instructions: Enter the final centered note shown inside the pink background box.
sub_fields.placeholder: When selecting the type of surgery, patient preferences for the final breast outlook should be considered.

sub_fields.label: Top Image
sub_fields.name: top_image
sub_fields.instructions: Upload the full-width image shown directly below the heading.

sub_fields.label: Section Heading
sub_fields.name: section_heading
sub_fields.instructions: Enter the section heading.

sub_fields.label: Heading Level
sub_fields.name: heading_level
sub_fields.instructions: Choose the semantic heading level used for this section.

sub_fields.label: Show Divider Above
sub_fields.name: show_divider_above
sub_fields.instructions: Enable to show the standalone divider block above this section.

sub_fields.label: Highlight Text
sub_fields.name: highlight_text
sub_fields.instructions: Optional highlighted callout shown above the main body content.
sub_fields.placeholder: A patient's weight is not a limiting factor for undergoing surgery, however, there are a few considerations for all patients wishing to undergo top surgery.

sub_fields.label: Body Content
sub_fields.name: body_content
sub_fields.instructions: Add the main body content. Use this rich text area for paragraphs and any styled lists needed in the section.

sub_fields.label: List Style Variant
sub_fields.name: list_style_variant
sub_fields.instructions: Choose the list style first if this section needs bullets between the body content and bottom note. Default is a normal bullet list with one full text field per bullet. Highlighted Lead Text creates bullets with a pink lead phrase followed by normal supporting text.

sub_fields.label: List Items
sub_fields.name: list_items
sub_fields.instructions: Optional. Add one bullet per row. The fields shown in each row change based on the selected List Style Variant. Use Default for simple bullet lines. Use Highlighted Lead Text when each bullet starts with a pink highlighted phrase followed by regular supporting copy.

sub_fields.label: Bullet Text
sub_fields.name: default_text
sub_fields.instructions: Use this for the Default list style. Enter the full bullet text in one field.

sub_fields.label: Lead Text
sub_fields.name: lead_text
sub_fields.instructions: Use this for the Highlighted Lead Text style. This becomes the pink highlighted phrase at the start of the bullet.

sub_fields.label: Supporting Text
sub_fields.name: supporting_text
sub_fields.instructions: Use this for the Highlighted Lead Text style. Enter the regular sentence that follows the pink lead phrase.
sub_fields.placeholder: who are deemed competent to make their treatment decisions can provide consent for surgery independently.

sub_fields.label: Bottom Note
sub_fields.name: bottom_note
sub_fields.instructions: Optional note shown below the main content, such as a highlighted final sentence.

sub_fields.label: Card Image
sub_fields.name: card_image
sub_fields.instructions: Upload the image used as the reactive card background.

sub_fields.label: Card Position
sub_fields.name: card_position
sub_fields.instructions: Choose whether the reactive card appears on the left or right.

sub_fields.label: Card Top Spacing
sub_fields.name: add_card_top_spacing
sub_fields.instructions: Enable extra top spacing on the reactive card when the design requires it.

sub_fields.label: Show Divider Above
sub_fields.name: show_divider_above
sub_fields.instructions: Enable to show the standalone divider block above this section.

sub_fields.label: Section Heading
sub_fields.name: section_heading
sub_fields.instructions: Enter the heading shown on the right side of the section.
sub_fields.placeholder: Top Surgery, Breast Disease and Breast Cancer

sub_fields.label: Quote Content
sub_fields.name: quote_content
sub_fields.instructions: Add the quote or statistic shown in the left column. Inline links and emphasis are supported. To match the original accent words, switch to the Text editor and wrap the highlighted words like this: <span class="text-accent">Your text</span>. Example: <span class="text-accent">partner institutes</span>.

sub_fields.label: Quote Position
sub_fields.name: quote_position
sub_fields.instructions: Choose whether the quote appears on the left or right side on desktop layouts.

sub_fields.label: Body Content
sub_fields.name: body_content
sub_fields.instructions: Add the main body content shown on the right side of the section.

sub_fields.label: Bottom Content Style
sub_fields.name: bottom_content_style
sub_fields.instructions: This changes how the Bottom Content is rendered on the page. Highlighted Note: centered emphasis line below the section. Body Content Block: normal full-width content below the section, useful for paragraphs and lists like grants or references.

sub_fields.label: Bottom Content
sub_fields.name: bottom_note
sub_fields.instructions: Optional content shown below the two-column section. Use this field for either a short centered note or a full-width content block, depending on Bottom Content Style.

sub_fields.label: List Style Variant
sub_fields.name: list_style_variant
sub_fields.instructions: Optional. Choose the list style for bullets shown below the content block. Default renders each bullet as one full line. Highlighted Lead Text renders a highlighted phrase first, followed by supporting text, matching the research grants style.

sub_fields.label: List Items
sub_fields.name: list_items
sub_fields.instructions: Optional. Add one bullet per row below the content block. The fields shown in each row change based on the selected List Style Variant.

sub_fields.label: Bullet Text
sub_fields.name: default_text
sub_fields.instructions: Use this for the Default list style. Enter the full bullet text in one field.

sub_fields.label: Lead Text
sub_fields.name: lead_text
sub_fields.instructions: Use this for the Highlighted Lead Text style. This becomes the highlighted phrase at the start of the bullet.

sub_fields.label: Supporting Text
sub_fields.name: supporting_text
sub_fields.instructions: Use this for the Highlighted Lead Text style. Enter the regular sentence that follows the highlighted lead phrase.
sub_fields.placeholder: Tour de Cure Pioneering Research Grant, Validating a novel nanotechnology...

sub_fields.label: Show Divider Above
sub_fields.name: show_divider_above
sub_fields.instructions: Enable to show the standalone divider block above this section.

sub_fields.label: Section Heading
sub_fields.name: section_heading
sub_fields.instructions: Enter the main heading shown above the intro text.

sub_fields.label: Intro Text
sub_fields.name: intro_text
sub_fields.instructions: Add the centered intro text shown below the section heading.

sub_fields.label: Cards
sub_fields.name: cards
sub_fields.instructions: Add the cards shown in the two-column grid.

sub_fields.label: Image
sub_fields.name: image
sub_fields.instructions: Upload the card image.

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.name: title
sub_fields.instructions: Card title shown under the image. If a link is added below, the link title will be used instead.

sub_fields.label: Title Link
sub_fields.name: link
sub_fields.instructions: Optional link for the card title.

sub_fields.label: Body Content
sub_fields.name: body_content
sub_fields.instructions: Add the card body copy.

sub_fields.label: Show Divider Above
sub_fields.name: show_divider_above
sub_fields.instructions: Enable to show the standalone divider block above this section.

sub_fields.label: Section Heading
sub_fields.name: section_heading
sub_fields.instructions: Enter the main heading shown at the top of the section.

sub_fields.label: Intro Text
sub_fields.name: intro_text
sub_fields.instructions: Add the intro text shown directly below the heading.

sub_fields.label: Body Content
sub_fields.name: body_content
sub_fields.instructions: Add the introductory body text shown above the list.

sub_fields.label: List Items
sub_fields.name: list_items
sub_fields.instructions: Add the bullet points shown in the list.

sub_fields.label: Item
sub_fields.name: item
sub_fields.placeholder: Search online for other examples of top surgery, and collect some pictures of your desired cosmetic outcome.

sub_fields.label: CTA Content
sub_fields.name: cta_content
sub_fields.instructions: Add the centered CTA line shown below the list.

sub_fields.label: Section Heading
sub_fields.name: section_heading
sub_fields.instructions: Enter the heading shown above the list.

sub_fields.label: List Items
sub_fields.name: list_items
sub_fields.instructions: Add the list items shown below the heading.

sub_fields.label: Item
sub_fields.name: item
sub_fields.instructions: Add one list item. Links are supported.

sub_fields.label: Section Heading
sub_fields.name: section_heading
sub_fields.instructions: Enter the heading shown above the resource list.

sub_fields.label: List Items
sub_fields.name: list_items
sub_fields.instructions: Add the resource links shown below the heading.

sub_fields.label: Item
sub_fields.name: item
sub_fields.instructions: Add one list item. Links are supported.

sub_fields.label: Section Heading
sub_fields.name: section_heading
sub_fields.instructions: Enter the heading shown above the soft background content panel.

sub_fields.label: Panel Items
sub_fields.name: panel_items
sub_fields.instructions: Add one heading/content pair per row inside the soft background panel.

sub_fields.label: Item Heading
sub_fields.name: item_heading
sub_fields.instructions: Short heading shown inside the soft background panel.

sub_fields.label: Item Content
sub_fields.name: item_content
sub_fields.instructions: Paragraph content shown under the item heading.

sub_fields.label: Show Divider Above
sub_fields.name: show_divider_above
sub_fields.instructions: Enable to show the standalone divider block above this section.

sub_fields.label: Section Heading
sub_fields.name: section_heading
sub_fields.instructions: Enter the main heading for the text content shown to the right of the image.

sub_fields.label: Heading Alignment
sub_fields.name: heading_alignment
sub_fields.instructions: Choose whether the section heading is aligned left or centered. This controls heading alignment only and is independent from the intro style.

sub_fields.label: Intro Style
sub_fields.name: style_variant
sub_fields.instructions: Choose how the intro above the main body should appear. Highlighted Intro uses the Highlight Text field with the callout style. Plain Intro uses the Intro Text field as a plain H5 paragraph above the body content. Heading alignment is controlled separately by Heading Alignment.

sub_fields.label: Highlight Text
sub_fields.name: highlight_text
sub_fields.instructions: Use this when Intro Style is Highlighted Intro. This text appears in the accent callout style above the main body copy.

sub_fields.label: Intro Text
sub_fields.name: intro_text
sub_fields.instructions: Use this when Intro Style is Plain Intro. The text is shown as a plain H5 above the main body content. To match the original red accent words, wrap them like this: <span class="text-accent">Your text</span>.
sub_fields.placeholder: Transgender and nonbinary people may require top surgery as part of their gender affirmation journey.

sub_fields.label: Body Content
sub_fields.name: body_content
sub_fields.instructions: Add the main body copy shown to the right of the image.

sub_fields.label: Supporting Links Content
sub_fields.name: supporting_links_content
sub_fields.instructions: Optional supporting sentence or link line shown below the section copy.

sub_fields.label: List Style Variant
sub_fields.name: list_style_variant
sub_fields.instructions: Choose the list style first. Default is a normal bullet list with one simple text field per bullet. Highlighted Lead Text creates bullets with a pink lead phrase followed by supporting text.

sub_fields.label: List Items
sub_fields.name: list_items
sub_fields.instructions: Add one bullet per row. The fields shown below will change based on the selected List Style Variant.

sub_fields.label: Bullet Text
sub_fields.name: default_text
sub_fields.instructions: Use this for the Default list style. Enter the full bullet text here.

sub_fields.label: Lead Text
sub_fields.name: lead_text
sub_fields.instructions: Use this for the Highlighted Lead Text style. This text becomes the pink lead phrase at the start of the bullet.

sub_fields.label: Supporting Text
sub_fields.name: supporting_text
sub_fields.instructions: Use this for the Highlighted Lead Text style. Enter the normal supporting text that appears after the lead phrase.
sub_fields.placeholder: Bring this with you to your first appointment.

sub_fields.label: Add Top Spacing
sub_fields.name: add_top_spacing
sub_fields.instructions: Enable to add extra spacing above this section.

sub_fields.label: Bottom Divider
sub_fields.name: add_divider
sub_fields.instructions: Enable the bottom divider line used between stacked sections.

sub_fields.label: Image Position
sub_fields.name: image_position
sub_fields.instructions: Choose whether the image appears on the left or right side of the section. Leave this as Left for existing sections unless the design clearly places the image on the right.

sub_fields.label: Section Image
sub_fields.name: section_image
sub_fields.instructions: Upload the illustration or image shown in the image column for this section.

sub_fields.label: Section Heading
sub_fields.name: section_heading
sub_fields.instructions: Enter the overall section heading shown above the intro callout and technique items.

sub_fields.label: Intro Callout Content
sub_fields.name: intro_callout_content
sub_fields.instructions: Optional highlighted callout shown below the section heading.

sub_fields.label: Technique Items
sub_fields.name: technique_items
sub_fields.instructions: Add one technique row per item. Each item supports an image, a main heading, intro copy, and optional stacked subheading/content blocks.

sub_fields.label: Technique Image
sub_fields.name: technique_image
sub_fields.instructions: Upload the illustration shown to the left of this technique item.

sub_fields.label: Technique Heading
sub_fields.name: technique_heading
sub_fields.instructions: Main heading shown at the top of the technique content column.

sub_fields.label: Intro Content
sub_fields.name: intro_content
sub_fields.instructions: Opening content shown directly under the technique heading.

sub_fields.label: Content Blocks
sub_fields.name: content_blocks
sub_fields.instructions: Optional stacked subheading/content blocks shown below the intro content.

sub_fields.label: Block Heading
sub_fields.name: block_heading
sub_fields.instructions: Optional subheading such as Advantages of Keyhole Top Surgery.

sub_fields.label: Block Content
sub_fields.name: block_content
sub_fields.instructions: Content shown under this subheading.

sub_fields.label: Bottom Heading
sub_fields.name: bottom_heading
sub_fields.instructions: Optional heading shown below all technique items as the closing full-width block.

sub_fields.label: Bottom Content
sub_fields.name: bottom_content
sub_fields.instructions: Optional full-width content shown below all technique items.

description: Flexible content page builder for creating custom page layouts. Build pages using modular, reusable content sections that can be arranged in any order to create unique page designs.
